mapper.select: SELECT h.hid, h.title, h.type, t.tname as typeName, h.page_views as pageViews, h.like_count as likeCount, h.comment_count as commentCount, TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, h.published_time, NOW()) as pastHours, h.publisher, u.username as author, h.status, h.is_top as isTop, h.cover_image_url as coverImage, h.created_time as createdTime, h.updated_time as updatedTime, h.published_time as publishedTime, h.source_type as sourceType, h.source_id as sourceId, h.lang, h.mongodb_collection as mongodbCollection, h.mongodb_document_id as mongodbDocumentId FROM headlines h LEFT JOIN news_types t ON h.type = t.tid LEFT JOIN users u ON h.publisher = u.id WHERE h.hid = #{hid}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO headlines (title, summary, type, cover_image_url, tags, page_views, publisher, author, status, is_top, created_time, updated_time, published_time, like_count, comment_count, source_type, source_id, mongodb_collection, mongodb_document_id, lang) VALUES (#{title}, #{summary}, #{type}, #{coverImage}, #{tags}, 0, #{publisher}, #{author}, #{status}, #{isTop}, NOW(), NOW(), NOW(), 0, 0, #{sourceType}, #{sourceId}, #{mongodbCollection}, #{mongodbDocumentId}, #{lang})
mapper.update: UPDATE headlines SET title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, type = #{type}, cover_image_url = #{coverImage}, tags = #{tags}, author = #{author}, updated_time = NOW(), source_type = #{sourceType}, source_id = #{sourceId}, mongodb_collection = #{mongodbCollection}, mongodb_document_id = #{mongodbDocumentId}, lang = #{lang} WHERE hid = #{hid}
UPDATE headlines SET page_views = page_views + 1 WHERE hid = #{hid}
mapper.select: SELECT tname FROM news_types WHERE tid = #{type}

SELECT h.hid, h.title, h.type, t.tname as typeName, h.page_views as pageViews, h.like_count as likeCount, h.comment_count as commentCount, TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, h.published_time, NOW()) as pastHours, h.publisher, u.username as author, h.status, h.is_top as isTop, h.cover_image_url as coverImage, h.created_time as createdTime, h.updated_time as updatedTime, h.published_time as publishedTime, h.source_type as sourceType, h.source_id as sourceId, h.lang, h.mongodb_collection as mongodbCollection, h.mongodb_document_id as mongodbDocumentId FROM headlines h LEFT JOIN news_types t ON h.type = t.tid LEFT JOIN users u ON h.publisher = u.id WHERE h.hid = #{id}
